arts.ttl: Watford offer ‘not appreciated’ – Hornets invited to return with higher amount
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Besiktas have rejected an offer from Watford for their goalkeeper Ersin Destanoglu. The 24-year-old has been linked with a move to the Hornets in the past week following reports of a bid from the English club.
